track_name: I Love You All the Time (Live) [Play It Forward Campaign]
album_name: I Love You All the Time (Live) [Play It Forward Campaign]
description: Eagles Of Death Metal’s Play It Forward Campaign features new versions of the band’s “I Love You All The Time” by a bevy of their peers. Play these tracks to support the victims of the Paris attacks. Check out the amazing covers below and head to http://playitforwardeodm.com for more info.
